docket_entries.description: APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, LAURA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIANEZ, ROBERTO $102.92 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $102.92, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BASED ON THE TERMS OF A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN DEFENDANT SAINEZ, PLAINTIFF LAURA PEREZ, AND PLAINTIFF'S THEN CO- TENANT JOSE LUIS LOPEZ. SINCE BOTH LAURA LOPEZ & JOSE LUIS LOPEZ SIGNED THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT THIS JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF ONE-HALF AS PLFT'S SHARE-OF THE BALANCE DUE TO STIP SETTLEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF PEREZ, LAURA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $205.84 FILED BY PEREZ, LAURA AS TO DEFENDANT SIANEZ, ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIANEZ, ROBERTO
